name: Camping World Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Camping World Holdings, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries) is Americas largest retailer of RVs and related products and services. Through our Camping World and Good Sam brands, our vision is to make it easy for everyone to enjoy RVing and empower our customers joy of travel. We strive to build long-term value for our customers, employees, and stockholders by combining a comprehensive offering of RV products and services with a national network of RV dealerships, service center...
